greeting: I can help you quickly process employee call-ins, manage shift changes, and ensure accurate time-off tracking. Just tell me who called in and for which shift.

suggestedPrompts.title: Mark Employee Call-In
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Mark Susan Jones as a call-in for her shift today.

suggestedPrompts.title: Call-In with PTO
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Michael Reed called in. Please use PTO for his absence.

suggestedPrompts.title: Call-In for 'Susie'
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Susie called out for her shift today.

suggestedPrompts.title: Specific Date Call-In
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Mark Susan Jones as a call-in for her 9 AM shift on 2/3/2026. Use sick leave.

suggestedPrompts.title: Mark Unpaid Call-In
suggestedPrompts.prompt: Mark Michael Reed as a call-in, it should be unpaid.
